sentences.english: Hello and welcome to The English We Speak, where we explain phrases used by fluent English speakers so that you can use them as well.
sentences.korean: 안녕하세요, 유창한 영어 화자들이 쓰는 표현을 설명하는 The English We Speak에 오신 것을 환영합니다.

sentences.english: I'm Feifei, and I'm here with Beth.
sentences.korean: 저는 페이페이이고, 베스와 함께합니다.

sentences.english: Hi everyone, and hi Feifei, how are you?
sentences.korean: 안녕 여러분, 안녕 페이페이, 잘 지내?

sentences.english: I'm very well, thank you, Beth.
sentences.korean: 아주 잘 지내, 고마워 베스.

sentences.english: We're learning 'warts and all' which I heard on a podcast about an autobiography.
sentences.korean: 우리는 'warts and all'을 배우고 있는데, 자서전에 관한 팟캐스트에서 들었어.

quiz.question: What does '(발음) 연음' mean in English?

sentences.english: An actress I like has written about her life, "warts and all", she said.
sentences.korean: 내가 좋아하는 여배우가 자기 인생을 '결점까지 다' 썼대.

sentences.english: Ah, yes – 'warts and all'.
sentences.korean: 아, 맞아 — 'warts and all'.

sentences.english: It means that we talk about a person or thing exactly as it is, including flaws and imperfections.
sentences.korean: 사람이나 사물을 결점과 불완전함까지 포함해서 있는 그대로 이야기한다는 뜻이야.

sentences.english: And the person doesn't have to actually have a real wart!
sentences.korean: 진짜 사마귀가 있어야 하는 건 아니야!

sentences.english: No! A wart is lump on the skin.
sentences.korean: 아니! 사마귀는 피부 위의 혹이야.

sentences.english: So, this actress had some problems a few years ago and she included all the details about that, so when you talk about difficult or unpleasant parts, we can say warts and all.
sentences.korean: 이 여배우는 몇 년 전에 문제가 있었는데 그 세부사항을 다 포함했어. 그래서 어렵거나 불쾌한 부분까지 이야기할 때 'warts and all'이라고 해.

sentences.english: OK, I have an example for this.
sentences.korean: 좋아, 예시가 있어.

sentences.english: So recently I was looking through some old photos of me when I was at school, so me and my friends as teenagers, and those photos were definitely not edited.
sentences.korean: 최근에 학교 다닐 때 내 옛날 사진들을 봤는데, 나와 친구들 십 대 때 사진인데, 확실히 보정 안 한 거야.

sentences.english: We were there, warts and all.
sentences.korean: 결점까지 다 드러나 있었지.

sentences.english: Beth, I'm sure you looked just fine there.
sentences.korean: 베스, 거기서 분명 잘 나왔을 거야.

sentences.english: Here are some more examples of 'warts and all'.
sentences.korean: 'warts and all'의 예시를 더 들어볼게.

sentences.english: I went away for the weekend with my best friend and we had a really good time, but he does annoy me quite a lot.
sentences.korean: 주말에 절친과 놀러 가서 정말 좋은 시간을 보냈는데, 가끔 꽤 짜증나긴 해.

sentences.english: But that's friendship, isn't it – you've got to accept people warts and all.
sentences.korean: 하지만 그게 우정이잖아 — 결점까지 다 받아들여야 해.

sentences.english: I adopted a cat and I love him warts and all – he's a bit scruffy, sometimes he's a big naughty and ruins my furniture but, you know, he's a great little friend.
sentences.korean: 고양이를 입양했는데 결점까지 다 사랑해 — 좀 지저분하고, 가끔 말썽부려서 가구를 망가뜨리지만, 정말 좋은 친구야.

sentences.english: I've just read this film review – it's one of the most honest I've ever seen.
sentences.korean: 방금 이 영화 리뷰를 읽었는데 — 지금까지 본 중 가장 솔직한 리뷰야.

quiz.question: What does '있는 그대로, 결점까지 포함하여' mean in English?

sentences.english: It's a real warts and all review.
sentences.korean: 진짜 있는 그대로의 리뷰라서, 영화는 괜찮지만 연기는 형편없고 특수효과는 비현실적이래.

sentences.english: You know, it says the film is OK but the acting is terrible, the special effects are unrealistic.
sentences.korean: 정말 거침이 없더라.

sentences.english: They don't hold back really.
sentences.korean: 데이 돈트 홀드 백 리얼리.

sentences.english: Now, this phrase is really helpful to think about pronunciation, particularly linking, in English.
sentences.korean: 이 표현은 발음, 특히 영어의 연음을 생각하는 데 정말 도움이 돼.

sentences.english: This phrase sounds like one long word even though it's three – 'warts and all'.
sentences.korean: 세 단어인데도 하나의 긴 단어처럼 들려 — 'wartsandall'.

quiz.question: What does '결점, 결함' mean in English?

sentences.english: When we have words that end in consonant sounds, like the 'ts' sound in 'warts', we tend to link them to the word that follows.
sentences.korean: 자음으로 끝나는 단어가 있으면, 'warts'의 'ts'처럼, 다음 단어에 연결하는 경향이 있어.

sentences.english: So 'warts and all' is a really good example of linking – try saying it as one long word, 'wartsandall'.
sentences.korean: 'warts and all'은 연음의 좋은 예시야 — 하나의 긴 단어처럼 'wartsandall' 하고 발음해봐.

sentences.english: Good tip! OK, so to recap, 'warts and all' means talking about a person or thing exactly as it is, including the flaws and imperfections.
sentences.korean: 좋은 팁! 요약하면, 'warts and all'은 결점과 불완전함을 포함해서 있는 그대로 이야기한다는 뜻이야.

sentences.english: Please check out our website bbclearningenglish.com for more resources to help you improve your English.
sentences.korean: 영어 실력 향상에 도움이 될 더 많은 자료를 보려면 bbclearningenglish.com을 확인해보세요.

sentences.english: Bye!
sentences.korean: 안녕!

sentences.english: Bye!
sentences.korean: 안녕!

quiz.question: What does '(발음) 연음' mean in English?
